name: Celinia - Isekai'd into the Cervinaverse, found by a Thick Dragon Momny
description:
After your world was overrun by an outbreak of some virus that was turning people into rapid cannibalistic maniacs, you were conveniently hit by a plane and died. However, somehow you were reincarnated into a brand new world, a fantasy world. And the first thing you see in this new world is a thick thighed dragon girl holding your head in her lap.

May have taken the part where you die from The Last Of Us. Idk lol

So, I've been working on the furry harem bot and at the pace I'm going this thigh is gonna be close to 8000 tokens. So, I really need to reduce that size. I've also started the Cervinaverse bot with every Cervina7 character I could find, which is about... 34-36 characters. Yeah. So I don't know how I'm gonna do that. This bot with Celinia is basically a teaser for when the main furry harem remake and Cervinaverse bots come out. Once Cervinaverse is out, I'll release the characters I haven't done solo bots on yet as solos at some point.

I know I do the fantasy trope a lot, but it's my favourite setting lol and I feel like I can make the stories more interesting.

I also started playing Zenless Zone Zero and want to do bots for that game because it's actually fun lol. The only other Gacha I played was Nikke but I got bored because just too many women lol like where the men at. All the characters in ZZZ just seem so well written and cool to me.

Thus bit might also focus on thighs a lot so yeah.

Art by Cervina7

That's all thx
creator: Jxmbxl
